title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: 1. **Provider check false positive (most likely).** `--check` treats GLM as available when `delegate-glm.js` exists and `ZAI_API_KEY` is set, without a live API probe, so readiness can be green while runtime calls fail. See [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:756](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L756), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:760](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L760), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:918](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L918), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:921](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L921). 2. **Model candidate drift (very likely).** Bridge injects a candidate list headed by `glm-4.5-air`, while delegate defaults differ (`glm-5.0`, `glm-4.6`, ...); unknown-model churn can look like provider outage before fallback candidate succeeds/fails. See [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:29](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L29), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:652](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L652), [delegate-glm.js:49](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js#L49), [delegate-glm.js:467](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js#L467). 3. **Timeout budget mismatch (likely).** Outer bridge timeout (GLM default 300s) and inner delegate adaptive timeout/retries can conflict; long candidate cycling/retries can be killed by outer timeout and classified as GLM failure. See [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:67](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L67), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:544](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L544), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:872](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L872), [delegate-glm.js:427](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js#L427), [timeout-tracker.js:66](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/timeout-tracker.js#L66). 4. **Parser mismatch / format fragility (medium).** Delegate emits human-readable banners/metrics; bridge parses JSON first, then GLM-prose heuristics. Format drift can set `parseError` (`glm_output_not_json`) even with exit 0, which upstream may treat as lane failure. See [output-format.js:224](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/output-format.js#L224), [output-format.js:238](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/output-format.js#L238), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:405](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L405), [kernel-lane-bridge.mjs:582](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L582). 5. **Lane accounting/gating misread as “GLM down” (medium).** Baseline trio gate marks `missing-glm` unless a non-skipped top-level GLM lane returns `200` or `cli:0`; this is accounting failure, not always provider outage. See [run-local-orchestration.sh:985](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L985), [run-local-orchestration.sh:989](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L989), [run-local-orchestration.sh:1006](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1006), [run-local-orchestration.sh:1011](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1011). 6. **Stale success logs masking current state (lower, diagnostic).** `active-model-lanes.jsonl` keeps historical GLM successes and can create false operator confidence without freshness filtering. See [active-model-lanes.jsonl:4](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/active-model-lanes.jsonl#L4), [active-model-lanes.jsonl:19](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/state/active-model-lanes.jsonl#L19). Single-lane fallback note: if execution proceeds with Codex/Claude...
